prompt: Diagnose the most likely fault or failure mode and explain what evidence supports it.
scenario: You are on a heavy-industrial construction or process site where work follows engineered drawings, specifications, and permits. The work under review is Calibration, part of the Instrumentation & Controls scope. The observed field condition is: zero vs. span error diagnosis from cal sheet (FD+DOC). The work is in service as an operating asset. Reference material on hand: ISA standards, site QC.
title: Fault diagnosis: Calibration (industrial site)
